summary: Reverted PHP legacy fallback, created one-off migration script, migrated all legacy blocks in the database, and verified both test pages render correctly.

tasks.task: Revert PHP legacy fallback in ContentWithMedia.php
tasks.details: Removed $legacyDescription, $legacyButtons, $hasLegacyContent variables and conditional logic. Restored hardcoded enableDescription=false and enableButtons=false in ThemeHeading call.

Created scripts/migrate-content-with-media.js (Node.js) and scripts/migrate-content-with-media.php (PHP/WP-CLI). Both support dry-run (default) and --apply modes. The JS version also supports stdin/stdout piping and WP REST API modes.

Build passed. Dry-run test on sample content: migrated 2, skipped 1 (correct). Full migration on page 168 content: migrated 13, skipped 2 (correct -- Quick Video and Minimal Section had no description/buttons). Updated page 168 via taktician_wp_update. Block count verification: all 15 blocks present with correct InnerBlocks structure. Page audit on both pages passed.

filesChanged.changes: Reverted legacy fallback: removed $legacyDescription, $legacyButtons, $hasLegacyContent. Restored hardcoded enableDescription=false, enableButtons=false.

Node.js one-off migration script. Converts self-closing takt/content-with-media blocks with description/buttons attributes to open/close blocks with InnerBlocks (core/paragraph + takt/button-row). Supports dry-run, --apply, stdin/stdout, and WP REST API modes.
PHP/WP-CLI version of migration script using parse_blocks/serialize_blocks. Supports dry-run and --apply modes via wp eval-file.

dryRunTest.input: 3 sample blocks (2 with legacy attrs, 1 without)

testContentWithMedia.details: All 5 sections render correctly with headings, paragraphs, buttons, images, and video. Dark mode and H3 heading variants work as expected.

testContentWithMedia2.details: All 15 migrated sections render correctly. 13 sections have InnerBlocks content (discourse wrapper with paragraphs and/or buttons). 2 sections correctly have no content (Quick Video and Minimal Section). Dark mode (4 sections), reversed layout, single image, video types (file/youtube/vimeo), H3 heading size, and long content edge cases all verified.
